text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Palmer laughing it up with some
friends in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Can you, like, believe Helios said that?! I was
legit crying with laughter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ohoho! I say, what a simply riveting story!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Friend
text_block_list.text: Um, girl? What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
N-nothing, nothing! I'm just a bit tired, so my
brain's all fried!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Gah! Just pretend you didn't hear me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like all her back-to-back races are
getting to her. I need to adjust her schedule, and
the sooner the better.
